requirement_topic.en: EDSA / EWRC Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings, and EWRC Licensing
requirement_topic.zh: EDSA / EWRC并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数及EWRC许可
requirement_topic.zht: EDSA / EWRC併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數及EWRC許可

summary.en: Sierra Leone's grid operates at 50 Hz, single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V — the IEC standard nominal voltage, not the 220/380 V Chinese domestic grid baseline under GB/T 156. Grid-tied solar PV inverters must meet EDSA's technical connection conditions, which reference IEC standards. The Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC), established under the Electricity Act 2011, licenses electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and supply activities; any grid-connected solar PV project requires an EWRC licence or project approval, and equipment must meet the technical standards specified in that licence. Anti-islanding protection to IEC 62116 is required for grid-tied inverters: inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within the time limits set under IEC 62116. Inverter firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be validated for Sierra Leone's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid parameters, not Chinese 220/380 V defaults. Note: Sierra Leone's grid infrastructure remains limited and intermittent in 2026; actual grid-connection projects are project-specific and subject to EDSA and EWRC case-by-case review.
summary.zh: 塞拉利昂电网运行于50 Hz、单相230 V、三相400 V——即IEC标准额定电压，而非中国依据GB/T 156的220/380 V国内电网基准。并网太阳能光伏逆变器须满足EDSA的技术并网条件，该条件引用IEC标准。依据《2011年电力法》设立的电力和水务监管委员会（EWRC）对发电、输电、配电和供电活动颁发许可；任何并网太阳能光伏项目须取得EWRC许可或项目审批，且设备须满足许可中规定的技术标准。并网逆变器须符合IEC 62116防孤岛保护要求：逆变器须在IEC 62116规定的时限内检测电网失电并断开。逆变器固件保护阈值和重连延迟须针对塞拉利昂230/400 V、50 Hz电网参数进行验证，而非中国220/380 V默认值。注：截至2026年，塞拉利昂电网基础设施仍较有限且供电不稳定；实际并网项目具有项目特殊性，须经EDSA和EWRC逐案审查。
summary.zht: 獅子山電網運行於50 Hz、單相230 V、三相400 V——即IEC標準額定電壓，而非中國依據GB/T 156的220/380 V國內電網基準。併網太陽能光伏逆變器須滿足EDSA的技術併網條件，該條件引用IEC標準。依據《2011年電力法》設立的電力和水務監管委員會（EWRC）對發電、輸電、配電和供電活動頒發許可；任何併網太陽能光伏項目須取得EWRC許可或項目審批，且設備須滿足許可中規定的技術標準。併網逆變器須符合IEC 62116防孤島保護要求：逆變器須在IEC 62116規定的時限內偵測電網失電並斷開。逆變器韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須針對獅子山230/400 V、50 Hz電網參數進行驗證，而非中國220/380 V預設值。注：截至2026年，獅子山電網基礎設施仍較有限且供電不穩定；實際併網項目具有項目特殊性，須經EDSA和EWRC逐案審查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (IEC standard referenced in Sierra Leone grid connection context)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (sets grid-connection parameters for PV systems including 230/400 V 50 Hz)
Sierra Leone Electricity Act 2011 — establishes EWRC licensing regime for electricity infrastructure including solar PV
EDSA (Electricity Distribution and Supply Authority) — technical connection conditions for grid-tied PV (project-specific, confirm with EDSA)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese grid conditions. These Chinese documents are based on China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid baseline (GB/T 156) and are not accepted by EDSA or EWRC as evidence of compliance with Sierra Leone's 230/400 V grid-connection conditions. Firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and re-validated for Sierra Leone's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及中国电网条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国文件基于中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网基准（GB/T 156），不被EDSA或EWRC接受为符合塞拉利昂230/400 V并网条件的证据。针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值须重新参数化并针对塞拉利昂230/400 V、50 Hz电网重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及中國電網條件下的國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國文件基於中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網基準（GB/T 156），不被EDSA或EWRC接受為符合獅子山230/400 V併網條件的證據。針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值須重新參數化並針對獅子山230/400 V、50 Hz電網重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China domestic: 220/380 V 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy EDSA / EWRC Sierra Leone grid-connection requirements. Exporters must: (a) obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model; (b) re-parameterise and document inverter firmware for Sierra Leone's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese default; (c) confirm EWRC licensing requirements for the specific project type (generation licence or exemption) with EWRC before equipment procurement; (d) obtain EDSA technical connection approval for grid-tied installations on a project-by-project basis. Note: Sierra Leone's weak and intermittent grid means that projects must also address inverter behaviour under abnormal grid conditions (frequent voltage sags, outages) — confirm LVRT/HVRT and reconnection settings with the project engineer.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足EDSA / EWRC塞拉利昂并网要求。出口商须：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）将逆变器固件重新参数化并记录为塞拉利昂230/400 V、50 Hz电网——而非中国220/380 V默认值；（c）在采购设备前向EWRC确认特定项目类型的EWRC许可要求（发电许可或豁免）；（d）逐项目获取EDSA对并网装置的技术并网批准。注：塞拉利昂电网薄弱且不稳定，项目还须解决异常电网条件（频繁电压跌落、停电）下的逆变器行为——须与项目工程师确认低/高电压穿越和重连整定值。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足EDSA / EWRC獅子山併網要求。出口商須：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）將逆變器韌體重新參數化並記錄為獅子山230/400 V、50 Hz電網——而非中國220/380 V預設值；（c）在採購設備前向EWRC確認特定項目類型的EWRC許可要求（發電許可或豁免）；（d）逐項目獲取EDSA對併網裝置的技術併網批准。注：獅子山電網薄弱且不穩定，項目還須解決異常電網條件（頻繁電壓跌落、停電）下的逆變器行為——須與項目工程師確認低/高電壓穿越和重連整定值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-tied solar PV installations connected to the EDSA network; EWRC licensing is a statutory requirement under the Electricity Act 2011 for electricity infrastructure projects
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements under Chinese conditions but is not transferable to Sierra Leone EDSA / EWRC grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC), Sierra Leone

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sierra Leone grid-connection requires EWRC licensing and EDSA technical approval on a project-by-project basis. Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy these requirements. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for 230/400 V, 50 Hz before testing and document the configuration. Obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Engage EWRC and EDSA early in project planning to confirm current licensing requirements and technical connection conditions — both institutions' published technical specifications are limited and conditions are project-specific.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞拉利昂并网要求EWRC许可和逐项目EDSA技术批准。中国GB/T并网文件不满足上述要求。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为230/400 V、50 Hz，并记录配置。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据。应在项目规划早期与EWRC和EDSA接触，确认当前许可要求和技术并网条件——两家机构公开的技术规格有限，条件具有项目特殊性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 獅子山併網要求EWRC許可和逐項目EDSA技術批准。中國GB/T併網文件不滿足上述要求。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為230/400 V、50 Hz，並記錄配置。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62116防孤島測試證據。應在項目規劃早期與EWRC和EDSA接觸，確認當前許可要求和技術併網條件——兩家機構公開的技術規格有限，條件具有項目特殊性。

requirement_topic.en: Off-Grid and Mini-Grid Solar PV — IEC TS 62257, VeraSol Tier Quality Framework, and Donor/Lender Procurement Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 离网及微电网太阳能光伏——IEC TS 62257、VeraSol等级质量框架及捐助方/贷款方采购要求
requirement_topic.zht: 離網及微電網太陽能光伏——IEC TS 62257、VeraSol等級質量框架及捐助方/貸款方採購要求

summary.en: With Sierra Leone's electrification rate approximately 25% in 2026, off-grid and mini-grid solar PV applications represent the dominant market segment. The Rural Renewable Energy Project and donor/lender-backed mini-grid programmes (including UNOPS/DFID-backed schemes that were once among Africa's largest mini-grid initiatives) drive equipment procurement. Donor agencies (World Bank, African Development Bank, DFID/FCDO, UNOPS) and international lenders typically mandate: (a) IEC TS 62257 series (Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification) compliance for off-grid and mini-grid components, including inverters; (b) VeraSol (formerly GOGLA Lighting Global) Tier 1 or above qualification for solar home system (SHS) inverters or all-in-one systems; (c) evidence of product quality verification by an independent, internationally recognised laboratory. These requirements are embedded in donor procurement conditions, not in standalone Sierra Leone legislation, but they are operationally mandatory for any project using donor or concessional finance.
summary.zh: 2026年塞拉利昂电气化率约为25%，离网和微电网太阳能光伏应用是主导市场细分领域。农村可再生能源项目及捐助方/贷款方支持的微电网计划（包括曾是非洲最大微电网项目之一的UNOPS/DFID支持的计划）推动设备采购。捐助机构（世界银行、非洲开发银行、DFID/FCDO、UNOPS）和国际贷款方通常要求：（a）离网和微电网组件（包括逆变器）符合IEC TS 62257系列（农村电气化小型可再生能源及混合系统建议）；（b）太阳能家庭系统（SHS）逆变器或一体化系统获得VeraSol（原GOGLA Lighting Global）一级或以上认证；（c）提供来自独立国际认可实验室的产品质量验证证据。上述要求包含在捐助方采购条件中，而非独立的塞拉利昂立法，但对于任何使用捐助方或优惠融资的项目，其在操作上是强制性的。
summary.zht: 2026年獅子山電氣化率約為25%，離網和微電網太陽能光伏應用是主導市場細分領域。農村可再生能源項目及捐助方/貸款方支持的微電網計畫（包括曾是非洲最大微電網項目之一的UNOPS/DFID支持的計畫）推動設備採購。捐助機構（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、DFID/FCDO、UNOPS）和國際貸款方通常要求：（a）離網和微電網組件（包括逆變器）符合IEC TS 62257系列（農村電氣化小型可再生能源及混合系統建議）；（b）太陽能家庭系統（SHS）逆變器或一體化系統獲得VeraSol（原GOGLA Lighting Global）一級或以上認證；（c）提供來自獨立國際認可實驗室的產品質量驗證證據。上述要求包含在捐助方採購條件中，而非獨立的獅子山立法，但對於任何使用捐助方或優惠融資的項目，其在操作上是強制性的。

standards_or_laws: IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for small renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification (covers off-grid and mini-grid PV components including inverters)
VeraSol (formerly Lighting Global / GOGLA) — Quality Assurance Framework and Tier qualification for solar home systems and mini-grid components
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (commonly required by donor procurement specs for off-grid inverters)
World Bank / AfDB / FCDO procurement standards — donor/lender-specific equipment quality and testing requirements embedded in project-level procurement conditions

summary.en: China does not have a domestic standard directly equivalent to IEC TS 62257 for rural off-grid electrification. Chinese off-grid PV inverter documentation commonly references GB/T 37408-2019 (grid-connected inverter technical requirements) or GB/T 20321-2006 (off-grid wind/PV power systems, now superseded). Neither of these Chinese standards satisfies IEC TS 62257 compliance requirements or VeraSol Tier qualification criteria. Chinese manufacturers exporting to donor-funded Sierra Leone off-grid or mini-grid projects must obtain independent laboratory verification against IEC TS 62257 and VeraSol quality requirements specifically — Chinese domestic approvals are not accepted as substitutes.
summary.zh: 中国没有与IEC TS 62257农村离网电气化直接等效的国内标准。中国离网光伏逆变器文件通常引用GB/T 37408-2019（并网逆变器技术要求）或GB/T 20321-2006（离网风光互补发电系统，现已废止）。上述中国标准均不满足IEC TS 62257合规要求或VeraSol等级认证标准。出口至捐助方资助的塞拉利昂离网或微电网项目的中国制造商须专门针对IEC TS 62257和VeraSol质量要求取得独立实验室验证——中国国内审批不被接受为替代。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與IEC TS 62257農村離網電氣化直接等效的國內標準。中國離網光伏逆變器文件通常引用GB/T 37408-2019（併網逆變器技術要求）或GB/T 20321-2006（離網風光互補發電系統，現已廢止）。上述中國標準均不滿足IEC TS 62257合規要求或VeraSol等級認證標準。出口至捐助方資助的獅子山離網或微電網項目的中國製造商須專門針對IEC TS 62257和VeraSol質量要求取得獨立實驗室驗證——中國國內審批不被接受為替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 20321-2006 — 离网型风光互补发电系统 (Off-grid wind/photovoltaic hybrid power systems) — largely superseded

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic certifications do not satisfy donor/lender IEC TS 62257 or VeraSol Tier qualification requirements for Sierra Leone off-grid and mini-grid projects. Exporters and project developers must: (a) check whether the specific inverter product or SHS system holds a current VeraSol Tier 1 or above qualification (published at verasol.org); (b) obtain IEC TS 62257-9-5 or applicable part test results from an internationally recognised laboratory if VeraSol is not already held; (c) confirm specific donor procurement conditions with the project owner before equipment commitment — World Bank, AfDB, FCDO, and UNOPS each publish their own procurement framework and eligible equipment lists. Donor-funded projects in Sierra Leone may also require equipment registration or approval under any EWRC framework applicable to off-grid systems.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内认证不满足塞拉利昂离网和微电网项目的捐助方/贷款方IEC TS 62257或VeraSol等级认证要求。出口商和项目开发商须：（a）确认特定逆变器产品或SHS系统是否持有当前VeraSol一级或以上认证（在verasol.org公布）；（b）若尚未持有VeraSol，须从国际认可实验室取得IEC TS 62257-9-5或相关部分测试结果；（c）在设备确认前向项目业主确认具体捐助方采购条件——世界银行、非洲开发银行、FCDO和UNOPS各自发布采购框架和合格设备清单。塞拉利昂捐助方资助项目还可能要求设备在EWRC框架下（如适用于离网系统）进行注册或审批。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內認證不滿足獅子山離網和微電網項目的捐助方/貸款方IEC TS 62257或VeraSol等級認證要求。出口商和項目開發商須：（a）確認特定逆變器產品或SHS系統是否持有當前VeraSol一級或以上認證（在verasol.org公布）；（b）若尚未持有VeraSol，須從國際認可實驗室取得IEC TS 62257-9-5或相關部分測試結果；（c）在設備確認前向項目業主確認具體捐助方採購條件——世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、FCDO和UNOPS各自發布採購框架和合格設備清單。獅子山捐助方資助項目還可能要求設備在EWRC框架下（如適用於離網系統）進行登記或審批。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for all donor-funded and concessional-finance off-grid and mini-grid projects in Sierra Leone; VeraSol Tier qualification and IEC TS 62257 testing are standard donor procurement gates
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory requirement for off-grid inverters under Chinese domestic law; GB/T standards are voluntary for this segment

source.publisher: VeraSol (administered by CLASP); IEC TS 62257 published by IEC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Sierra Leone off-grid and mini-grid projects, Chinese domestic certifications do not replace IEC TS 62257 compliance or VeraSol Tier qualification required by donor and lender procurement frameworks. Check VeraSol's published eligible product list at verasol.org before committing a product to a donor-funded project. Confirm specific procurement conditions with the project owner and verify whether any EWRC registration or approval applies to the off-grid system type. Do not assume Chinese GB/T documentation will be accepted.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于塞拉利昂离网和微电网项目，中国国内认证不能替代捐助方和贷款方采购框架所要求的IEC TS 62257合规或VeraSol等级认证。在将产品用于捐助方资助项目前，请在verasol.org查看VeraSol公布的合格产品清单。请向项目业主确认具体采购条件，并核实任何EWRC注册或审批是否适用于该离网系统类型。请勿假设中国GB/T文件将被接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於獅子山離網和微電網項目，中國國內認證不能替代捐助方和貸款方採購框架所要求的IEC TS 62257合規或VeraSol等級認證。在將產品用於捐助方資助項目前，請在verasol.org查看VeraSol公布的合格產品清單。請向項目業主確認具體採購條件，並核實任何EWRC登記或審批是否適用於該離網系統類型。請勿假設中國GB/T文件將被接受。
